column1: # ESP32-S3 Partition Table — enlarged app slot for BLE Mesh baseline build
#   The default 1 MB app partition overflows once BASELINE_TEST is enabled
#   (boot_id persistence + extra PROP_* marshalling push the image to
#   ~1.06 MB). The ESP32-S3 devkits ship with ≥4 MB flash so we simply
#   widen the app slot to 2 MB — plenty of headroom for future growth.
# Layout (4 MB target flash; shift end offsets if you use 8 MB):
#   coredump  0x210000   64 KB    (panic core dumps — useful for thesis)
# Offsets MUST be 64 KB aligned for app partitions. Verify with:
